title: PokelandServer
description: Modpack for PokelandMC server about Cobblemons and exploring!
body:
Modpack for PokelandMC server about Cobblemons and exploring!

What can you do?
You can explore with Biomes O' Plenty and Regions Unexplored and loot some structures that are improved with Yung's Structures and more.
You can catch Cobblemons! In the modpack is lots of Cobblemon Addons which makes catching Cobblemons a lot special!
You can do something industrial with Create mod
You can build with Supplementaries and morw
and more!
